1739090.name: The Majesti Soundtrack
1739090.description:
The Majesti Soundtrack includes all 58 original music tracks from the game. It begins with the opening title, and proceeds in the same order as the events in the game.

Composing this music was very meaningful to me. Many tracks--especially those with lyrics--are more than just background music to enhane the feelings of the art and writing; they originated from emotional events in my own life.
